titleStmt.title: SII 9.581: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 581. (A.R. No. 781 of 1917.) ON A BOULDER TO THE WEST OF THE VILLAGE CHAUTAKUNTAPALLI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1459, Hēmaḷambi, Āśvayuja, śu. 11, corresponding to A.D. 1537 September 15, Saturday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It states that a copper-plate grant was issued recording the gift of Kañchākarahaḷḷi for the service of the gods Pāpavināśa, Vīrēśa and Raṅganātha at Lēpakshi by Virapaṇṇaya, son of Nandi-Lakkiseṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhu
dayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu
1459 ya hēmaḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada Āśvayija śu 11 lū
śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
Accutadēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁgeyiUttaṁ yi
du lēpākṣi pāpavināśa vīrēśa raṁganāthadēvarige Amru
tapaḍi Aṁgaraṁgavayibhōgake dhāre
yaneṟadu śāsanastavāgi tāṁbrasāsanava
nu koṭadu kaṁcākarahaḷi 1 naṁdi
lakiseṭṭiyara makkaḷu penuguṁḍe
ya virapaṁṇayana sēve .
Digital edition of SII 9.581 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
